channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Matress and lots of rubbish been dumped, 5th April
item.description:
From the 161 bus stop all the way up to dunkery road there is mattress, cardboard, general rubbish, cans , canister so much and saw a mouse as well this is disgusting and there is so much rubbish it's all over the paths by the houses as well.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mottingham Road, Coldharbour, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A cabinet and drawers been dumped, 5th April
item.description:
This is just by the grass on ravensworth road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravensworth Road, Mottingham, Greater London

item.title: A sink cabinet been dumped, 5th April
item.description:
A big sink cabinet been dumped on grass
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Prestbury Square, Elmstead, Greater London

item.title: Weeds at the foot of the two new saplings by the granite planters / corner features at the jct of Kelsey Sq / Burnhill Rd and High St, Beckenham., 5th April
item.description:
Weeds at the foot of the two new saplings by the granite planters / corner features at the jct of Kelsey Sq / Burnhill Rd and High St, Beckenham. I cannot tell whether the greenery in the planters are weeds or desirable plants, too. The planting must be kept low for road safety visibility to enter the busy High St, too

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kelsey Square, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 of 2 The granite planters / corner features at the jct of Kelsey Sq / Burnhill Rd and High St, Beckenham are dirty and need cleaning., 5th April
item.description:
2 of 2 The granite planters / corner features at the jct of Kelsey Sq / Burnhill Rd and High St, Beckenham are dirty and need cleaning. These are also in the Beckenham Town Conservation Area.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kelsey Square, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 1 of 2 Granite bench / corner feature at jct of Village Way and High St, Beckenham dirty and needs cleaning., 5th April
item.description:
1 of 2 Granite bench / corner feature at jct of Village Way and High St, Beckenham dirty and needs cleaning.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 240, High Street, Beckenham, Greater London

item.title: Criminal damage to Parking signs because times sprayed painted over, 5th April
item.description:
All these parking signs on Cherry garden street have been criminally damaged because they have all had the times sprayed painted over. This happened on Friday 3rd April 2026

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-14, Perryn Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress has been left blocking the pavement, 5th April
item.description:
Mattress has been abandoned blocking the pavement. Absolutely upsetting seeing this kind of uncivil behavior.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Harton Close, Widmore, Greater London

item.title: Lamp posts 18 and 19; all the pavement lights, 5th April
item.description:
Lamp posts 18 and 19 are the markers for the lights that are sunken into the pavement in the post box square between Glengall Road and Priory Road. None of the sunken lights are working. This means the area is very dark. It has previously between an area where muggings took place.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glengall Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegally parked on zig zag, 5th April
item.description:
Illegally parked on zig zag by the school every day

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lewisham Road, London

item.title: Recycling facility in Avenue Road Carpark needs emptying, 5th April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blackthorn Grove, Welling, Greater London

item.title: Dog fouling, 5th April
item.description:
The tenants of this property of where i have pin pointed the ground floor property have two dogs that they allow to poo on the grass areas around the estate
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brodie Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Streatham High Road SW16 1PN number 63 ie Streath, 5th April
item.description:
Streatham High Road SW16 1PN number 63 ie Streatham Library at north end (ie not Pinfold Rd junction end) of frontage is a black painted doorway (fire exit?) which is tagged. Kindly NB – the graffiti filth above the door may be over 6 foot off the ground which if so is outside your contractor’s reach so you will need to put in a ‘special’ request eg like when a traffic sign get tagged (or just find a tall person or a paint brush with an extra long handle…..) Please forward fixmystreet.com link to your contractor for picture.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 63, Streatham High Road, Streatham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The bins are consistently overfilled, with large quantities of rubbish bags left on the ground., 5th April
item.description:
For several months now, both residential and commercial waste has been left overflowing in communal areas. The bins are consistently overfilled, with large quantities of rubbish bags left on the ground around them. As shown in the attached photographs, waste is not only spilling out of the bins but is also scattered across the surrounding area, including near residential doorways, walkways, and parking spaces. This ongoing situation has led to a significant increase in rat activity. The presence of food waste and unsecured rubbish is clearly attracting rodents, creating serious concerns for public health, hygiene, and safety It also poses a risk to children and pets who may come into contact with contaminated materials.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stringers Close, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet
